title: Restrict, Disable, or Prevent Use of Nonessential Programs, Ports, Protocols, and Services
description: Restrict, disable, or prevent the use of nonessential programs, functions, ports, protocols, and services.

checks.name: Insecure Protocols are Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify insecure protocols (SMBv1, TLS 1.0, TLS 1.1, LMv1, NTLMv1) are disabled via registry settings

checks.name: Unused Ports are Blocked by Firewall
checks.purpose: Confirm Windows Defender Firewall blocks inbound traffic on non-approved ports

checks.name: Remote Desktop Protocol Access is Controlled
checks.purpose: Verify RDP is either disabled or restricted to authorized IP ranges and requires NLA authentication

checks.name: PowerShell Execution Policy is Restricted
checks.purpose: Confirm PowerShell execution policy is set to RemoteSigned or AllSigned to prevent unauthorized script execution

checks.name: Insecure Protocols are Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify insecure protocols (SMBv1, TLS 1.0, TLS 1.1, LMv1, NTLMv1) are disabled via registry settings

checks.name: Unused Ports are Blocked by Firewall
checks.purpose: Confirm Windows Defender Firewall blocks inbound traffic on non-approved ports for this server's role

checks.name: Remote Desktop Protocol Access is Controlled
checks.purpose: Verify RDP is either disabled or restricted to authorized IP ranges and requires NLA authentication

checks.name: PowerShell Execution Policy is Restricted
checks.purpose: Confirm PowerShell execution policy is set to RemoteSigned or AllSigned

checks.name: Telnet and FTP Services are Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify Telnet Server and FTP services are not installed or are disabled on this server

checks.name: Insecure Services are Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify telnet, rsh, rlogin, rexec, tftp, and other insecure legacy services are not installed or are disabled

checks.name: Only Authorized Ports are Open
checks.purpose: Confirm only authorized ports are listening by comparing ss -tlnp output against the approved port list

checks.name: IPv6 is Disabled if Not Required
checks.purpose: Verify IPv6 is disabled via sysctl if it is not required for system operation, reducing unnecessary attack surface

checks.name: Weak SSH Ciphers and Algorithms are Disabled
checks.purpose: Confirm sshd_config restricts Ciphers, MACs, and KexAlgorithms to only approved strong algorithms

checks.name: Insecure Services are Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify telnet, rsh, rlogin, tftp, and other insecure services are not installed or are disabled on Debian

checks.name: Only Authorized Ports are Open
checks.purpose: Confirm only authorized ports are listening by comparing ss -tlnp output against the approved port list

checks.name: IPv6 is Disabled if Not Required
checks.purpose: Verify IPv6 is disabled via sysctl if not required, reducing unnecessary attack surface

checks.name: Weak SSH Ciphers and Algorithms are Disabled
checks.purpose: Confirm sshd_config restricts Ciphers, MACs, and KexAlgorithms to only approved strong algorithms

remediation: Disable SMBv1, TLS 1.0/1.1, NTLMv1 via registry. Block non-approved ports via Windows Firewall. Restrict RDP to authorized IPs with NLA. On Linux, remove or disable telnet, rsh, and other insecure services. Restrict SSH ciphers to approved algorithms. Disable IPv6 where not required.
